complaint: Water is leaking from the ceiling in the bathroom. There is a brown stain growing on the ceiling and water drips when upstairs neighbor uses their shower.
resolution: Dispatched emergency plumber. Found corroded pipe fitting in unit above. Replaced fitting and patched ceiling drywall. Resolved in 6 hours.

complaint: The kitchen faucet is dripping constantly and won't turn off completely. Wasting a lot of water.
resolution: Plumber replaced worn cartridge in single-handle faucet. No further leaks. Resolved in 2 hours on-site.

complaint: AC unit is blowing warm air even though it's set to 68 degrees. It's been 90+ degrees outside and my apartment is unbearable.
resolution: HVAC technician found refrigerant leak. Recharged system and sealed leak. Verified cooling within 1 hour. Total time 3 hours.

complaint: The heater makes a loud banging noise every time it turns on. It wakes us up at night.
resolution: HVAC tech found loose blower motor mount. Tightened mounts and lubricated bearings. Noise eliminated. 1.5 hours on-site.

complaint: Multiple power outlets in the living room stopped working. Tried resetting the breaker but they still don't work.
resolution: Electrician found a tripped GFCI outlet in the chain. Reset and tested all downstream outlets. All working. 45 minutes on-site.

complaint: I smell something burning near the electrical panel. There are scorch marks on the panel cover.
resolution: Emergency electrician dispatched immediately. Found overloaded circuit with melted wire insulation. Replaced wiring and breaker. Building inspector signed off. 4 hours total.

complaint: There are cockroaches in my kitchen. I've seen them near the sink and behind the refrigerator. It's getting worse.
resolution: Pest control treated kitchen and common areas with gel bait and residual spray. Follow-up treatment scheduled in 2 weeks. Initial treatment 1 hour.

complaint: My front door lock is broken. I can't lock my apartment door. Anyone could walk in.
resolution: Maintenance replaced deadbolt and handle lock set. Provided 3 new keys to tenant. Completed in 1 hour.

complaint: The garbage disposal is jammed and making a humming noise when I turn it on.
resolution: Maintenance used Allen wrench to free jam. Tested disposal — working normally. 15 minutes on-site.

complaint: There is black mold growing in the bathroom around the bathtub and on the ceiling. My family has been having respiratory issues.
resolution: Mold remediation team dispatched. Removed affected drywall, treated with antimicrobial solution, installed new ventilation fan. 2-day project.

complaint: The dishwasher is leaking water onto the kitchen floor every time it runs.
resolution: Appliance tech found cracked door gasket. Replaced gasket and tested — no leaks. 1 hour on-site.

complaint: The refrigerator stopped cooling. All my food is spoiling. I need this fixed urgently.
resolution: Appliance tech diagnosed failed compressor relay. Replaced relay and start capacitor. Fridge cooling within 2 hours. Total time 3 hours.

complaint: My toilet keeps running non-stop. I can hear water constantly flowing.
resolution: Plumber replaced flapper valve and adjusted fill valve height. Toilet operating normally. 30 minutes on-site.

complaint: The smoke detector keeps beeping every 30 seconds. I replaced the battery but it won't stop.
resolution: Maintenance replaced hardwired smoke detector unit. Tested all units in the apartment. 30 minutes on-site.

complaint: My bedroom window is cracked and won't close properly. Cold air is coming through and I can hear street noise.
resolution: Maintenance applied temporary weather seal. Window replacement ordered and installed within 5 business days. Total resolution 6 days.

complaint: Gas smell coming from the stove area. I turned off the stove but the smell persists.
resolution: Emergency response: gas shut off immediately. Gas company inspected and found leaking stove connection. Replaced flex connector and tested for leaks. 2 hours total.

complaint: The hallway light in our unit won't turn on. We've tried changing the bulb but the switch seems dead.
resolution: Electrician found faulty light switch. Replaced single-pole switch. 20 minutes on-site.

complaint: I found bedbugs in my mattress. There are small bites on my arms when I wake up.
resolution: Pest control performed heat treatment on entire unit. All furniture inspected and treated. Follow-up inspection in 10 days confirmed elimination. Full day treatment.

complaint: The washing machine in the laundry room on our floor is vibrating violently and moving across the floor during spin cycle.
resolution: Appliance tech found worn shock absorbers. Replaced all 4 shock absorbers and re-leveled machine. 1.5 hours on-site.

complaint: Water is flooding from under the bathroom sink. I've turned off the valve but water is still pooling.
resolution: Emergency plumber dispatched. Found burst supply line under sink. Shut off main water to unit, replaced supply line and repaired water damage. 4 hours total.

complaint: I noticed a few ants on the windowsill in the living room. Not a lot, but I want to stop it before it gets worse.
resolution: Pest control applied perimeter bait treatment around windows and entry points. Advised resident to seal food containers. 30 minutes on-site.

complaint: The heating system for the entire floor has failed. Multiple units are reporting no heat and it's below freezing outside.
resolution: Emergency HVAC team dispatched. Found failed boiler circulator pump for the floor zone. Replaced pump and bled radiators in all affected units. Restored heat within 3 hours.

complaint: The microwave makes a buzzing sound but still works fine. Just wanted to report it.
resolution: Appliance tech inspected microwave magnetron. Found normal operational sound. Tightened turntable motor mount which reduced noise. 20 minutes on-site.

complaint: The lights in my bathroom keep flickering on and off rapidly. I'm worried about an electrical fire.
resolution: Electrician found loose wire connection in the junction box above the bathroom. Re-terminated all connections and replaced corroded wire nuts. 1.5 hours on-site.

complaint: The closet door in the bedroom is off its track. It still slides but gets stuck halfway.
resolution: Maintenance re-hung sliding closet door, replaced worn roller wheels, and cleaned the track. 45 minutes on-site.

complaint: Hot water heater is leaking from the bottom. There's a large puddle forming and it smells like rust. I'm afraid of water damage to the apartment below.
resolution: Plumber shut off water heater supply and drained tank. Found corroded tank bottom. Emergency replacement with new 40-gallon unit completed same day. 5 hours total.

complaint: I found a large rat in my apartment. It ran under the refrigerator and I can hear it scratching. I have a baby and I'm terrified.
resolution: Emergency pest control dispatched. Set snap traps and sealed entry points around pipes and baseboards. Rat captured within 4 hours. Full unit inspection and sealing completed next day.

complaint: The thermostat display is blank and I can't adjust the temperature. The heating seems stuck on high and it's sweltering in here.
resolution: HVAC tech replaced faulty thermostat with new programmable unit. Calibrated temperature settings and tested heating/cooling cycles. 1 hour on-site.

complaint: The dryer in my unit stopped producing heat. Clothes come out still damp after a full cycle.
resolution: Appliance tech found burned out heating element. Replaced element and cleaned lint buildup in exhaust duct. Dryer fully functional. 2 hours on-site.

complaint: There is a crack in the bathroom tile near the shower. Water seems to be getting behind it when I shower.
resolution: Maintenance removed cracked tiles, inspected for water damage behind, applied waterproof membrane, and re-tiled the area. 4 hours on-site.
